character|popularity|value|Get the scoped character's popularity, normally ranging between -100 and +100
state|population_below_expected_sol|value|Scope to the current percentage of the state's population that are below their expected standard of living (0-1)
country|power_bloc|power_bloc|Scope to the power bloc for the scoped country
power_bloc|power_bloc_leader|country|Scope to the leader country of the scoped power bloc
new_combat_unit,military_formation,ship|power_projection|value|Get the power projection value of the scoped formation, unit, or ship
power_bloc|power_struggle_contender|country|Scope to the contender country if there is a power struggle
|prev||The previous scope Global Link: yes
country|principal|value|Get the current debt principal of the country
|principle|power_bloc_principle|Scope to the power bloc principle from its name (principle:key) Global Link: yes
|principle_group|power_bloc_principle_group|Scope to the power bloc principle group from its name (principle_group:key) Global Link: yes
company|prosperity|value|Scope to the amount of prosperity for scope company (example:
battle_side|province|province|Scope from a battle side to the province in which the battle is being fought
country|py|party|Scope to the active party of specified key belonging to the country
|rank_value|value|Scope to rank value of a particular country rank (rank_value:great_power)
building,diplomatic_play,hq,interest_marker,province,state,state_region|region|strategic_region|Scope to the strategic region of the object!
state_region|region_state|state|Unknown, add something in code registration
|rel|religion|Scope to the religion with specified key Global Link: yes
country|relations|value|Scope to relations between two countries (example: relations:root >= 2)
country|relations_change_rate|value|Scope to daily change in relations progress between two countries (example: relations_change_rate:root > 0)
|relations_threshold|value|Scope to relations threshold level for comparison purposes (relations_threshold:warm)
country,character,country_definition,political_movement,pop|religion|religion|Scope to country or country definition's primary religion or pop religion
treaty_options,treaty|remaining_binding_period|value|Get the current remaining binding period in days for the scoped treaty
building_type|required_construction|value|Get the required amount of construction for scope building type
|root||The head of the current top scope eg: reciever of an event, taker of a decision Global Link: yes
country|ruler|character|Scope to the ruler of a country
|s|state_region|Scope to state region specified by key Global Link: yes
|scope||Reference a previously saved scope via its name eg: scope:target Global Link: yes
diplomatic_relations|scope_relations|value|Scope to relations value in diplomatic relations scope (example:
diplomatic_relations|scope_tension|value|Scope to tension value in diplomatic relations scope (example:
military_formation|screening|value|Links from a fleet scope to the total screening of the ships in the fleet
diplomatic_pact,treaty_article,treaty_options,treaty_article_options,treaty|second_country|country|Scope to the second_country of any of: 1.
state|sg|state_goods|Scope from a state to the StateGoods with the specified key
ship|ship_fleet|military_formation|Links from a ship scope to the ship fleet
ship|ship_group|ship_group|Scope from a ship to its group
|ship_group|ship_group|Scope to a ship group from its name (ship_group:ship_group_capital_ships) Global Link: yes
|ship_type|ship_type|Scope to a ship type from its name (ship_type:ship_type_frigate) Global Link: yes
treaty_article|shipping_lane|shipping_lanes|Scope to the shipping lane for the military formation, or treaty article (goods transfer)
building_type|slaves_role|pop_type|Scope from building type to it's slaves role pop type
treaty_article,treaty_article_options|source_country|country|Scope to the source_country of any of: 1.
amendment|sponsor|interest_group|Links from an amendment scope to the interest group that sponsored the amendment
|sr|strategic_region|Scope to the strategic region of specified key Global Link: yes
building,market,pop,province|state|state|Scope to the state of the object
state|state_region|state_region|Scope to the state region of a state
country|strait_trade_importance_by|value|Scope to the trade importance of goods this country is trading through straits controlled by a target country.
|strait_type|strait_type|Scope to a strait type from its name (strait_type:key) Global Link: yes
diplomatic_play,diplomatic_catalyst,political_lobby,journal_entry|target||Scope to the target of the object
treaty_article,treaty_article_options|target_country|country|Scope to the target_country of any of: 1.
country|technology_being_researched|technology|Scope to the current technology a country is researching
country|techs_researched|value|Scope to the current amount of techs researched of a country
country|tension|value|Scope to tension between two countries (example: tension:root >= 2)
|tension_threshold|value|Scope to tension level threshold for comparison purposes (tension_threshold:warm)
battle_side,state|theater|theater|Scope from a BattleSide or State to its theater
|this||The current scope
country|top_overlord|country|Scope to the top overlord of the country in scope
country|total_crew_needed|value|Get the total crew needed by all ships of a country
country|total_export_value|value|Scope to the total value of scope country's exports to the world market (example:
country|total_import_value|value|Scope to the total value of scope country's imports from the world market (example:
country|total_marine_capacity|value|Get the total marine capacity across all fleets of a country
diplomatic_relations|total_pirated_trade_value|value|Scope to the total average weekly base value of goods pilfered via piracy between two countries in a diplomatic relations scope (example:
country|total_trade_value|value|Scope to the total value of scope country's trade with the world market (example:
market|trade_center|state|Scope to the trade center state of the market!
building|training_rate|value|Scope to the current maximum weekly training rate of a building
treaty_article|treaty|treaty|Scope to the treaty a treaty article belongs to
market_goods|treaty_exports|value|Get the current number of treaty (NOT world market) exports of the good to the market of the scoped MarketGoods
market_goods|treaty_imports|value|Get the current number of treaty (NOT world market) imports of the good to the market of the scoped MarketGoods
building,company,diplomatic_play,diplomatic_catalyst,political_lobby,institution,interest_group,law,political_movement,ship,strait,harvest_condition_area,amendment|type|building_type,company_type,diplomatic_play_type,institution_type,interest_group_type,law_type,political_movement_type,ship_type,strait_type,harvest_condition_type,amendment_type|Scope from an object to its type
|unit_type|combat_unit_type|Scope to a combat unit type from its name (unit_type:key) Global Link: yes
|value|value|A numeric literal value eg: 1, 5.2, -6 Wild Card: yes Global Link: yes
|var||Reference a previous set variable via its name eg: var:mortal_enemy
military_formation|visibility|value|Links from a fleet scope to the total visibility of the ships in the fleet
military_formation|vulnerability|value|Links from a fleet scope to the total vulnerability of the ships in the fleet
diplomatic_play|war|war|Scope from a diplomatic play to its war
company|weekly_prosperity_change|value|Scope to the weekly prosperity change for scope company (example:
pop|workplace|building|Scope to the workplace of a pop
state|world_market_hub|state|Scope to the world market hub state associated with the scoped state
|yes|boolean|Boolean literal for true values Global Link: yes
